title: Social Services Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Social Services Program Learning Outcomes

1-Professional and theoretical knowledge in the application environment, human relations and communication are capable of. Team work can.

2-Public sector, private sector, civil society organizations will carry out social work practice organizer, planner provides support in the process of helping nature.

3-Risk Groups knows what is going on.

4-To eliminate the risk of preventive developing-changing and therapeutic-rehabilitative work for the team assumes the role of social help.

5-Risk groups for the problems of process monitoring, information, orientation has the ability to do.

6-Risk groups (children, elderly, disabled, families, women, etc.). Holds information about the reasons.

7-Public law, legislation, regulations and codes of professional dominate the necessary legislation is put into practice.

8-Children in need of protection, the young, the elderly, the disabled, women and families, and intervention techniques in the study provides support to the team.

9-Families, women, children, youth, disabled, elderly and their families will have the ability to do consulting.

10-During the study, necessary documents, records, documents and prepare reports and fills.

11-Within the framework of social work in social work generally has the ability to prepare a social investigation report.
